decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 8/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 touched preferences but did not restructure for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 104/5756 lines reworked (1.8%, 29/50). 0/36 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 4.8% (5/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 41. Session 8: 47 (process:20 efficiency:17 ttfw:10). Session 9: 44 (process:20 efficiency:15 ttfw:9). Session 10: 49 (process:20 efficiency:20 ttfw:9). Session 11: 39 (process:20 efficiency:13 ttfw:6). Session 12: 27 (process:20 efficiency:4 ttfw:3).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 408/408 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters use 2 different interfaces. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
